summary: -Quick Actions Menu | Hearing Options When not in Rewinded State
description:
GIVEN the user is in the Quick Actions Menu
AND TTS is enabled
AND the user is not in the rewinded state

steps.action: WHEN the user focuses on the Quick Actions Menu
steps.result: THEN the user will hear:"Gameday option (1/3), <Last Channel Game> option (2/3), captions option (3/3))"
